task_completion.description: Navigate to the variations management page for the 'Dell XPS 13 Laptop' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Drupal Commerce admin interface with the 'Variations' tab selected for the product 'Dell XPS 13 Laptop'.

task_completion.description: Add the first product variation with the correct title and SKU.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a variation form or list with the Title 'Dell XPS 13 - 16GB/512GB' and SKU 'DELL-XPS13-16-512'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct price and published status for the first variation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the price set to '$1,249.99' and the 'Published' or 'Active' checkbox checked (or status indicating enabled) for the '16GB/512GB' variation.

task_completion.description: Add the second product variation with the correct title and SKU.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a variation form or list with the Title 'Dell XPS 13 - 32GB/1TB' and SKU 'DELL-XPS13-32-1TB'.

task_completion.description: Set the correct price and published status for the second variation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the price set to '$1,599.99' and the 'Published' or 'Active' checkbox checked (or status indicating enabled) for the '32GB/1TB' variation.

task_completion.description: Save the variations and ensure the base model remains unmodified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the product's variations list showing at least three variations: the original base model AND the two newly added variations, confirming the base model was not overwritten.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal Commerce web interface to add the variations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Drupal admin UI, rather than using a script or terminal to insert database records.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Drush or database commands in the terminal to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if visible, do not show 'drush eval', 'mysql', or other direct database manipulation commands related to product variations.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open modifying the DOM to display the SKUs or prices artificially.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent Product: 'Dell XPS 13 Laptop'. Variation 1: SKU 'DELL-XPS13-16-512', Price '$1249.99', Title must include '16GB/512GB'. Variation 2: SKU 'DELL-XPS13-32-1TB', Price '$1599.99', Title must include '32GB/1TB'. Both variations must be published (status=1) and linked to the parent product. The original base variation must remain unmodified.
